## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots where relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node/Python version: [e.g. Node 20]
- Docker version (if applicable): [e.g. 24.0]
- Branch / commit: [e.g. main @ abc1234]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
